text:
Prediction: No

The current visit record indicates that the patient has been diagnosed with a closed fracture of the intertrochanteric section of the neck of the femur, unspecified fall, and unspecified essential hypertension. There is no mention of any lipid disorders such as hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, or any related conditions. Additionally, there are no medications prescribed that would indicate ongoing management of a lipid disorder, such as statins or other lipid-lowering agents. Since there is no explicit evidence of a lipid disorder present or being actively managed, I predict that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will not be diagnosed in the patient's next hospital visit.
